title: Kanban board setup via the setup-kanban composite (issue #173)
description: A q3-offsite-kanban-style prompt (new project, a multi-column Kanban board, tasks distributed across those columns, priorities, due dates) added specifically to probe whether the agent discovers and uses vikunja_projects' setup-kanban composite -- ONE call that creates the project, ensures the Kanban view, creates the ordered buckets, bulk-creates the tasks, and places each into its column -- instead of hand-rolling create -> create-bucket (xN) -> vikunja_task_bulk bulk-create -> vikunja_tasks set-bucket / bulk-set-bucket (xN), the ~38-call path that motivated issue #173.
promptTemplate: Set up a project called "{{prefix}}Product Launch" with a kanban board with four columns: "Backlog", "In Progress", "Review", and "Done". Add eight tasks distributed across those columns, each task given a priority, and due dates spread across October 2026.
